identificationModule.officialTitle: Efficacy of a Toothpaste Containing Hydrogen Peroxide as Compared to a Regular Fluoride Toothpaste Without Hydrogen Peroxide in the Immediate Removal of Tooth Stains After a Single Brushing

interventions.name: Optic White Adv Sparkling White (2%HP) Toothpaste

primaryOutcomes.description: each tooth will be scored separately using a 4 point area and intensity scale
